name: Scalloped Chicken and Noodles
recipeIngredient: 10 1/2 oz Can of cream of chicken soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook noodles in boiling, salted water until tender yet firm, about 3-4 minutes. Drain.
2. Blend together soup and milk in a saucepan; heat thoroughly.
3. Combine chicken, mixed vegetables (thawed and drained), onion, pimento, salt, pepper, marjoram, thyme, garlic powder, and noodles in a large mixing bowl.
4. Stir in the soup mixture.
5. Turn the mixture into a 2-quart casserole dish.
6. Sprinkle breadcrumbs evenly over the mixture.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 425°F for 20-25 minutes, or until breadcrumbs are lightly browned.
8. Serves 4-6.
